text:
(In reply to Samy Mahmoudi from comment #4)

Please ignore Comment #4, I replied but forgot to remove the following:
- Reorder section blocks to pet portlint

Here is the final summary:

- Update to version 1.2.3
- Add LICENSE

This release features some small bug fixes and janitorial maintenance.

Release announcement: https://lists.x.org/archives/xorg/2019-February/059611.html
